notes: Tests validate workflow engine algorithms independently (DAG validation, topological sort, dependency resolution). These tests ensure correctness of core logic used by workflow_engine.py. Actual coverage increase requires integration tests that call WorkflowEngine methods directly.
coverage_note: No coverage increase because tests validate algorithms independently, not via WorkflowEngine class methods. Recommended follow-up: Add integration tests that execute workflows through WorkflowEngine.execute() to increase actual coverage.
